title: Poors Better Cobblemon+
description: Modpack that overhauls and makes cobblemon way better
body:
a modpack that makes cobblemon better with the use of datapacks and mods.
team up with your friends to do raids and gyms, discover new cobblemons from the mods included in the modpack and new structures to find them in! 
you dont have to worry about hostile mobs spawning because in this modpack it tries
to keep the immersion! cook and feed your cobblemon! ride them to traverse through water, land and air!
features include
- riding cobblemon
- cooking food for cobblemon
- towns
- gyms
- cobblemon structures
- new legendary and mythical cobblemon
- no hostile mobs spawning
- cobblemon attack back if you attack it
